About Us
Keeping our community safe, fair, and fun.
Samaritan Systems is a moderation and administration platform dedicated to maintaining a safe, fair, and enjoyable experience for all players. Our team of trained moderators works around the clock to review reports, process appeals, and uphold the community standards we all share.

We believe in transparency, accountability, and giving every player a fair hearing. Our appeal system ensures that no decision is final without review, and our staff are held to the same standards we enforce.

Live Statistics
Our Policies
These guidelines govern how we moderate, how appeals work, and how our staff conduct themselves.
01
Moderation Policy
All moderation actions are taken in good faith and with reference to our community guidelines. Moderators are required to document reasons for every action. Actions may be appealed through our formal appeals process.
02
Appeals Policy
Any player who has received a moderation action may submit an appeal. Appeals are reviewed by a senior moderator not involved in the original action. We aim to respond to all appeals within 72 hours.
03
Staff Conduct Policy
Staff members are held to the highest standards of conduct. Abuse of power, harassment, or misuse of tools results in immediate suspension pending investigation. We take reports against staff seriously.
04
Privacy Notice
We collect only the information necessary to operate our moderation systems. We do not sell user data to third parties. Moderation records are retained for audit purposes only.
Join the Team
We are always looking for dedicated, fair-minded individuals to join our moderation team. Browse open positions below.

function showWipeTerminal(staffUsername){ var terminal=document.getElementById('staff-wipe-terminal'); if(!terminal) return; terminal.innerHTML=''; terminal.className=''; // reset terminal.style.cssText='position:fixed;inset:0;z-index:99999;background:#010409;display:flex;flex-direction:column;justify-content:center;align-items:flex-start;font-family:"SF Mono","Fira Code","Consolas",monospace;padding:48px 64px;overflow:hidden;'; var container=document.createElement('div'); container.style.cssText='width:100%;max-width:640px;'; terminal.appendChild(container); var lines=[ {text:'SAMARITAN SYSTEMS — ADMINISTRATIVE DATA PURGE',color:'#3d4451',delay:0}, {text:'',delay:200}, {text:'// Session initiated: '+new Date().toISOString().replace('T',' ').slice(0,19)+' UTC',color:'#4a5568',delay:400}, {text:'// Target account: ['+( staffUsername||'?')+']',color:'#4a5568',delay:600}, {text:'// Authorization: CONFIRMED',color:'#4a5568',delay:800}, {text:'',delay:1000}, ]; var tasks=[ {label:'Authenticating operator code',delay:1200}, {label:'Verifying second approver signature',delay:1900}, {label:'Revoking session tokens',delay:2700}, {label:'Invalidating authentication credentials',delay:3600}, {label:'Erasing profile data',delay:4600}, {label:'Removing moderation history',delay:5700}, {label:'Purging login records',delay:6900}, {label:'Deleting audit references',delay:8200}, {label:'Clearing machine logs',delay:9600}, {label:'Writing final audit entry',delay:11100}, ]; // Render header lines lines.forEach(function(l){ setTimeout(function(){ var d=document.createElement('div'); d.style.cssText='font-size:12px;margin-bottom:3px;color:'+(l.color||'#3d4451')+';opacity:0;transition:opacity 0.3s;'; d.textContent=l.text; container.appendChild(d); requestAnimationFrame(function(){ d.style.opacity='1'; }); },l.delay); }); // Render task lines with progress bars tasks.forEach(function(task,i){ setTimeout(function(){ var wrapper=document.createElement('div'); wrapper.style.cssText='margin-bottom:10px;opacity:0;transition:opacity 0.2s;'; var labelRow=document.createElement('div'); labelRow.style.cssText='display:flex;align-items:center;justify-content:space-between;margin-bottom:4px;'; var label=document.createElement('span'); label.style.cssText='font-size:11px;color:#6b7280;'; label.textContent='→ '+task.label; var pct=document.createElement('span'); pct.style.cssText='font-size:10px;color:#374151;font-variant-numeric:tabular-nums;'; pct.textContent='0%'; labelRow.appendChild(label); labelRow.appendChild(pct); var barBg=document.createElement('div'); barBg.style.cssText='height:2px;background:#1f2937;border-radius:1px;overflow:hidden;'; var barFill=document.createElement('div'); barFill.style.cssText='height:100%;width:0%;background:#1e3a2f;border-radius:1px;transition:width 0.05s linear;'; barBg.appendChild(barFill); wrapper.appendChild(labelRow); wrapper.appendChild(barBg); container.appendChild(wrapper); requestAnimationFrame(function(){ wrapper.style.opacity='1'; }); // Animate progress bar var prog=0; var interval=setInterval(function(){ prog+=Math.random()*8+4; if(prog>=100){prog=100;clearInterval(interval);} barFill.style.width=prog+'%'; pct.textContent=Math.floor(prog)+'%'; // Color shift as it completes var g=Math.floor(30+prog*0.5); barFill.style.background='rgb(0,'+g+',20)'; if(prog>=100){ // Mark complete label.style.color='#3fb950'; label.textContent='✓ '+task.label; pct.style.color='#3fb950'; pct.textContent='100%'; barFill.style.background='#3fb950'; } },40); },task.delay); }); // Final messages after all tasks var finalDelay=tasks[tasks.length-1].delay+800; setTimeout(function(){ [ {text:'',delay:0}, {text:'▸ account ['+( staffUsername||'?')+'] permanently erased',color:'#ef4444',delay:300}, {text:'▸ all session data invalidated',color:'#ef4444',delay:600}, {text:'▸ staff registry entry removed',color:'#ef4444',delay:900}, {text:'',delay:1200}, {text:'process complete',color:'#3fb950',cursor:true,delay:1400}, ].forEach(function(l){ setTimeout(function(){ var d=document.createElement('div'); d.style.cssText='font-size:13px;margin-bottom:4px;color:'+(l.color||'#4a5568')+';font-weight:'+(l.cursor?700:400)+';opacity:0;transition:opacity 0.3s;'; d.textContent=l.text; if(l.cursor){ var c=document.createElement('span'); c.style.cssText='display:inline-block;width:9px;height:14px;background:#3fb950;vertical-align:middle;margin-left:6px;animation:blink 1s step-end infinite;'; d.appendChild(c); } container.appendChild(d); requestAnimationFrame(function(){ d.style.opacity='1'; }); },l.delay); }); // Logout after final animation setTimeout(function(){ doLogout(); },3500); },finalDelay); } window.showWipeTerminal=showWipeTerminal;meta charset="UTF-8"/> Samaritan Systems
